title: Psychotria nebulosa
taxonomy: Psychotria nebulosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Psychotria, which is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as wild coffee or Joe-pye weed. The family Rubiaceae is a significant group of flowering plants, comprising over 13,000 species worldwide. Within the Rubiaceae family, Psychotria nebulosa can be further classified based on its phylogenetic relationships with other species. However, the exact classification of Psychotria nebulosa may still be a subject of ongoing research and updates in botanical taxonomy.

intro: Psychotria nebulosa, also known as 'Nebula' or 'Cloud Forest Psychotria', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Psychotria nebulosa include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
